label: Track 1 Autonomous Trading
claim: CMC-driven autonomous BSC trading with TWAK self-custody execution and daily trade evidence.

label: Trust Wallet Agent Kit
claim: All execution is routed through TWAK quote/swap surfaces; dashboard and API remain read-only.

label: CoinMarketCap Data
claim: Eligible universe, market snapshots, regimes, funding proxy, watchlist, and scenario stress are derived from CMC-style market data.

label: BNB Identity Proof
claim: Agent wallet, policy hash, proof page, and registration/readiness surfaces expose judge-verifiable identity facts.

label: Operator Experience
claim: The operator can inspect readiness, alerts, drift, budget, playbook actions, and submission briefing without executing trades from the UI.
